title: Got some Qs for you peeps
display_title: Got some Qs for you peeps
wikitext:
[]: Got some Qs for you peeps Post by Draconis » Fri Jul 08, 2011 2:19 am Hey people. Been ing around the site for a while now, and finally decided to register. This site's been really useful in helping me understand some things, thanks to its [mostly] intelligent members. Just got a couple questions for you peeps. 1. I heard before about a "sequel theory" or whatever for Rebuild--that it was a sequel to the End of Evangelion, because of what Kowaro (sp?) says, the blood stain on the moon, etc. Then more recently, I read a thread here saying it was generally rejected. Is this true? And if so, why? 2. You guys like to pull super-nice looking high-res screenshots out of your butts like they're nothing. How do you guys take them? I've tried hard and failed. (Tried using Windows Media Player and CyberLink PowerDVD 9 with my bluray copies of the NMEs.) PS: I love your abundance of emoticons.

[]: Post by Nonoriri » Fri Jul 08, 2011 2:26 am Media Player Classic Home Cinema for screenshots

[]: Re: Got some Qs for you peeps Post by Seele00TextOnly » Fri Jul 08, 2011 2:27 am Draconis wrote: 1. I heard before about a "sequel theory" or whatever for Rebuild--that it was a sequel to the End of Evangelion, because of what Kowaro (sp?) says, the blood stain on the moon, etc. Then more recently, I read a thread here saying it was generally rejected. Is this true? And if so, why?

[]: Post by Draconis » Fri Jul 08, 2011 2:35 am She went off into space in the Eva? I thought it was still inside the Rei-Adam-Lilith being... I must not have been paying attention very closely. Whoops. VLC doesn't look like it supports blu-ray. And I can't tell regarding Media Player Classic Home Cinema. Anyone know one that for sure works for blu-rays?

[]: Post by Hyper Shinchan » Fri Jul 08, 2011 5:47 am You have to decrypt your BD with AnyDVD, BD's media protection prevents MPC-HC and VLC from playing your BD (and PowerDVD purposely disables screenshoots to comply with the protection mechanism).

[]: Post by Yue » Fri Jul 08, 2011 9:48 am The sequel theory was kind of interesting before 2.0. Something about Mark.06 being the original Lilith or even the original Unit 01 was compelling, but the way 2.0 played out, it's not possible to really make it work without some serious mental gymnastics.

[]: Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Jul 08, 2011 11:00 am The series hasn't suggested that it was a sequel yet. It's just suggested that it had more to explain about itself, like why Kaworu says the things he does, which could be a hundred different reasons as to why, one of them could have possibly been a sequel, but the viewer would have to stretch a lot of what little s/he knows about NME in order to make it work. Just let the movies be what they are at the moment, and if they reveal that they're a sequel in Q or FINAL, awesome! What a twist! If they don't, great! It's nice to see a different series of events in Evangelion.

[]: Post by symbv » Fri Jul 08, 2011 11:12 am Just think the subject of this thread is a bit vague.... Perhaps the first question can go to "Is Rebuild the aftermath of The End of Evangelion?" and the second question can go to a new thread specifically about "Screen capture question" in "Off-Topic section"...

[]: Post by Ornette » Fri Jul 08, 2011 11:38 am For question 1, see: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=6022 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=11604 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=10952 For question 2, see: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=10773
